notes: Solid, complete Pong implementation with trail effects, serve delay, score flashing, pause/game-over states, and proper ball angle physics — minor nitpick is the ball blink logic during serve is slightly awkward but everything works well.
An absolutely flawless implementation of Pong with excellent polish, juice (trails, flashes), robust collision math, and perfect game state management.

A solid and complete Pong implementation with working two-player controls and polished presentation, but not flawless due to minor logic/design imperfections like serve-direction comments mismatch and some non-classic gameplay embellishments.
